revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == This is a template to be used in siteboxes for defunct websites. Provide the URL as the first parameter, so that {{website defunct|1=http://www.example.com}}
gives
{{website defunct|1=http://www.example.com}} == See also == *{{tl|Dead link}} *{{tl|Onion defunct}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == This is a template to be used in siteboxes for defunct websites. Provide the URL as the first parameter, so that {{website defunct|1=http://www.example.com}}
gives
{{website defunct|1=http://www.example.com}} == See also == *{{tl|Dead link}} *{{tl|Onion defunct}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == This is a template to be used in siteboxes for defunct websites. Provide the URL as the first parameter, so that {{website defunct|1=http://www.example.com}}
gives
{{website defunct|1=http://www.example.com}} == See also == *{{tl|Dead link}} *{{tl|Onion defunct}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates]] [[Category:refreshing imports]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == This is a template to be used in siteboxes for defunct websites. Provide the URL as the first parameter, so that {{website defunct|1=http://www.example.com}}
gives
{{website defunct|1=http://www.example.com}} == See also == *{{tl|Dead link}} *{{tl|Onion defunct}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates]] [[Category:qq]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == This is a template to be used in siteboxes for defunct websites. Provide the URL as the first parameter, so that {{website defunct|1=http://www.example.com}}
gives
{{website defunct|1=http://www.example.com}} == See also == *{{tl|Dead link}} *{{tl|Onion defunct}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == This is a template to be used in siteboxes for defunct websites. Provide the URL as the first parameter, so that {{website defunct|1=http://www.example.com}}
gives

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23693191906|commit triggered pipeline]]

gives
